_comment: Recorded by jumpstarter-conformance tests/differential.rs against the real Go controller (controller/hack/conformance) on the shared envtest apiserver. (code, message) per spec-02 §12 case. Regenerate: JMP_CONFORMANCE_RECORD=1.

cases.name: exporter_not_listening
cases.message: exporter is not listening on lease lease

cases.name: resource_name_required
cases.message: resource name required for pre-existing authentication

cases.name: token_expired
cases.message: oidc: verify token: oidc: token is expired (Token Expiry: 2025-07-05 22:03:40 -0400 EDT)

cases.name: invalid_argument_create_lease
cases.message: one of selector or exporter_name is required

cases.name: aip_bad_segments
cases.message: invalid number of segments in identifier "namespaces/ns/leases", expecting 4, got 3

cases.name: aip_bad_first
cases.message: invalid first segment in identifier "nope/ns/leases/l", expecting "namespaces", got "nope"

cases.name: aip_bad_third
cases.message: invalid third segment in identifier "namespaces/ns/pods/l", expecting "leases", got "pods"
